what_it_indicates: Retailer/manufacturer in financial trouble but no Hilco/PFP/B-Stock/ReturnPro mentioned yet
why_pre_channel_gem: Short window to offer direct TL buy before professional disposition contract
primary_sources: Local news; trade press; early whispers before PR
positive_indicators: "furniture" "closing" -liquidation -Hilco -"going out of business sale" operator
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Store closing announced; warehouse mentioned; no named GOB firm in first articles
verification_steps: Press release names SB360 Hilco Gordon Brothers PFP ReturnPro or B-Stock partnership
automation_phase: 1) Read first 3 news articles 2) Search entity + liquidator names 3) Call/store visit if local

what_it_indicates: Stores closed or ops halted weeks before Ch7/Ch11 filing appears in papers
why_pre_channel_gem: Inventory may sit in DC/showroom with no formal disposition yet
primary_sources: Court filings; local TV/news; employee posts
positive_indicators: Dec closure news precedes bankruptcy by 30+ days; customer deposit chaos
already_has_channel_exclude_if: S27 bankruptcy PR published OR Ch7 filed with trustee + auction schedule already published
verification_steps: Compare closure date vs petition date; read customer complaint stories

what_it_indicates: Company hiring returns/disposition roles at the retailer—not at a 3PL liquidator
why_pre_channel_gem: They may be building internal process because no vendor locked yet
positive_indicators: Job posted at retailer brand; mentions excess returns volume; new role
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Job is at ReturnPro Inmar Liquidity Services B-Stock OR employer is S26 liquidation industry
verification_steps: Confirm employer is retailer/brand; note DC location in JD

what_it_indicates: Trade or earnings coverage cites excess stock warehouse costs; no liquidator cited
why_pre_channel_gem: Management may accept first serious truckload offer
primary_sources: Furniture Today earnings; industry blogs; local biz journals
positive_indicators: CEO/CFO quotes on inventory; seasonal miss; tariff overstock
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Article says retained Hilco or listed on B-Stock
verification_steps: Read full article; search follow-ups for disposition

what_it_indicates: Third-party warehouse holds aged/returned product; owner not moving it
why_pre_channel_gem: 3PL may pressure client or accept introducer to bulk buyer
primary_sources: Overstock Trader seller docs; 3PL industry; freight brokers; LinkedIn
positive_indicators: 3PL post about client inventory; lien threats; unpaid storage
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Inventory already listed on DL BULQ B-Stock OR 3PL is S26 liquidation industry
verification_steps: Identify 3PL vs retailer; confirm legal owner of goods

what_it_indicates: Strong dot-com home goods; weak reverse-logistics maturity; no public B2B program
why_pre_channel_gem: May negotiate direct before joining marketplace
primary_sources: SimilarWeb lists; state biz search; site returns policy
search_or_monitor_queries: "shopify" furniture high returns; regional furniture online store
positive_indicators: High return policy visibility; single DC; no careers page for liquidation
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Already on Wayfair-style marketplace as seller only OR S26 entity
verification_steps: Check for B-Stock; review About/Careers; news

what_it_indicates: Tariff cancel order factory overrun; factory or importer warehouse full
why_pre_channel_gem: Factory may sell TL once to avoid destruction
primary_sources: Industry trade; import records; LinkedIn factory posts
positive_indicators: Factory direct posts; warehouse full; need space by date
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Factory already uses Via Trading B-Stock regularly
verification_steps: Verify factory vs broker; ask for manifest

what_it_indicates: Furniture DC/showroom space listed; tenant vacating; goods may remain
why_pre_channel_gem: Landlord or tenant may need bulk take-away
positive_indicators: Short lease term; mentions racking inventory left behind
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Professional auctioneer named in listing
verification_steps: Call broker; ask if inventory included; site visit

what_it_indicates: Court docket shows new Ch11 with inventory on schedules BEFORE bankruptcy press/liquidator—silent early window
why_pre_channel_gem: 363 sale period outreach to debtor counsel before public story
primary_sources: PACER direct monitor (not BankruptcyObserver PR feed)
search_or_monitor_queries: Entity in docket only; no news hit yet; schedules show inventory; no stalking horse
positive_indicators: S27 press release OR newspaper bankruptcy story OR stalking horse approved OR 363 auction live
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Monitor docket daily pre-press; contact debtor counsel with TL offer
verification_steps: Phase1_PACER_early

what_it_indicates: Retailer pruning stores; managing own clearance; DC inventory may lag stores
why_pre_channel_gem: Post-store-clearance DC phase often less public than GOB signs
primary_sources: Retail Dive Furniture Today company PR
positive_indicators: Limited store count; company still solvent; mentions DC inventory separately
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Full chain liquidation with Hilco already running
verification_steps: Read PR; map DC locations; timing post retail floor clear

what_it_indicates: Independent store everything must go; owner-run; not national GOB marketing firm
why_pre_channel_gem: Owner may sell bulk remainder after retail floor picked clean
positive_indicators: Single location; family owner; phone in ad
already_has_channel_exclude_if: PFP Hilco banner on storefront or ad OR S26 liquidation company running sale
verification_steps: Visit store; ask owner about warehouse/backroom TL

what_it_indicates: Company complains about returns cost in press; no reverse-logistics vendor named
why_pre_channel_gem: Ops pain = openness to first buyer if approached respectfully
positive_indicators: Quantified return pain; initiative to reduce returns
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Partnership announced with ReturnPro Narvar Optoro
verification_steps: Find transcript; cross-check vendor announcements

what_it_indicates: Lender files on inventory; borrower default; goods encumbered
why_pre_channel_gem: May need quick monetization before auction
positive_indicators: Default notice; asset-based lender
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Public auction notice with auctioneer
verification_steps: Pull filing; identify borrower facility

what_it_indicates: Interview: replicate deals customer already got
why_pre_channel_gem: Defines positive training label—not a web find
positive_indicators: Story: called owner; before liquidator; 3PL intro
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Cannot verify externally
verification_steps: Record verbatim; tag signal IDs

what_it_indicates: Entity already on B-Stock ReturnPro DL Hilco PFP auction etc.
why_pre_channel_gem: Teaches agents what to drop—not a lead
primary_sources: B-Stock seller list; press with liquidator name
search_or_monitor_queries: Same entity + B-Stock OR Liquidation.com OR ReturnPro
positive_indicators: Any confirmed public channel
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Use to mark leads dead
verification_steps: Auto-exclude in Phase1

what_it_indicates: Furniture dealer floor-plan curtailment or repossession (Triumph WF CIT etc.)
why_pre_channel_gem: Dealer may move stock before national GOB operator branded
positive_indicators: Curtailment notice; lender suit; dealer group distress
already_has_channel_exclude_if: National liquidator named in same cycle
verification_steps: Verify dealer entity; call before PFP engagement

what_it_indicates: Worker Adjustment and Retraining Notification (WARN) at retailer or DC
why_pre_channel_gem: 60-90 day window may align with DC wind-down
positive_indicators: WARN filed; layoff at DC or retail ops
already_has_channel_exclude_if: S27 bankruptcy PR; use only stacked with S01 S02 S04
verification_steps: Pair with other signals; do not chase WARN alone

what_it_indicates: AlixPartners FTI Riveron retained; no Hilco GOB in press yet
why_pre_channel_gem: Serious stress window before disposition contract
positive_indicators: Advisor named; no liquidator in same article
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Follow-up names Hilco PFP or auctioneer
verification_steps: Read full PR chain; channel gate

what_it_indicates: Assignment for benefit of creditors (ABC) or state receiver before public auction catalog
why_pre_channel_gem: Manufacturer/importer inventory in court-supervised sale early
positive_indicators: A receiver appointed; no B-Stock catalog yet
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Auction catalog live with auctioneer
verification_steps: Contact receiver; monitor docket

what_it_indicates: 3PL or warehouse sues retailer for unpaid storage—extends S05
why_pre_channel_gem: Goods may need bulk buyer to clear building
positive_indicators: Active suit; unpaid storage; trapped goods
already_has_channel_exclude_if: S15 channel assigned on inventory
verification_steps: Pull suit; identify goods owner

what_it_indicates: Landlord evicts furniture tenant; goods may remain
why_pre_channel_gem: Bulk takeaway to empty space
positive_indicators: Eviction filed; goods on site
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Auctioneer named
verification_steps: Call landlord/tenant; confirm title

what_it_indicates: Craigslist/Facebook warehouse sale appointment only—not PFP/Hilco
why_pre_channel_gem: Scales S11; owner backroom clearance
positive_indicators: Local ad; phone; bulk language
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Obvious broker scam or S26 entity
verification_steps: Visit or call; legitimacy score

what_it_indicates: Warehouse sale page sitewide clearance Maps closed before liquidator news
why_pre_channel_gem: Early digital signal before press
search_or_monitor_queries: Site change detection on known entities
positive_indicators: New clearance page; policy change
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Redirects to Hilco B-Stock partner
verification_steps: Diff site; channel gate

what_it_indicates: SEC 10-Q 8-K impairment excess obsolete home goods issuer
why_pre_channel_gem: Public pressure to move stock before formal program
positive_indicators: Write-down spike; markdown language
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Disposition vendor in same filing
verification_steps: EDGAR search; transcript scan

what_it_indicates: Local dealer LLC closes stores; HQ may still be solvent
why_pre_channel_gem: Inventory trapped at dealer not corporate channel
positive_indicators: Multi-store local LLC distress
already_has_channel_exclude_if: HQ national liquidation program live
verification_steps: Identify local LLC; call dealer

what_it_indicates: Target IS a liquidator broker auctioneer ReturnPro goTRG remarketer—not trapped stock source
why_pre_channel_gem: Customer rule: do not pursue companies in the liquidation business
primary_sources: NAICS; company about page; B-Stock seller index
positive_indicators: Business model is selling distressed inventory to resellers
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Always exclude as opportunity source
verification_steps: Classify entity type before outreach

what_it_indicates: Bankruptcy filing announced via press release newspaper or trade press—customer says too late
why_pre_channel_gem: Window largely closed once public; use as negative training not hunt
primary_sources: News; PR wires; Google News bankruptcy
positive_indicators: Bankruptcy story in papers; Hilco often follows in days
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Always deprioritize for outreach; log as missed window
verification_steps: Auto-exclude when bankruptcy_public flag set

what_it_indicates: IRS Notice of Federal Tax Lien or state tax lien on business
why_pre_channel_gem: Cash stress often months before bankruptcy PR
primary_sources: county recorder; state lien portals; aggregators
positive_indicators: Lien recorded against business address
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Entity is S26 liquidation industry
verification_steps: Search recorder; stack with S01 S02 S08

what_it_indicates: Debt collection suit judgment or vendor non-payment lawsuit against retailer/manufacturer
why_pre_channel_gem: Late pay proxy before public bankruptcy
primary_sources: state civil court; judgment lien index
search_or_monitor_queries: collection OR vendor OR supplier lawsuit furniture
positive_indicators: Active civil suit; judgment; materialman lien
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Entity is S26; or S27 bankruptcy PR already
verification_steps: Suit search by debtor name; confirm operating

what_it_indicates: D&B Paydex or Experian Business score sliding; deteriorating trade credit (paid data)
why_pre_channel_gem: Private company payment stress before public distress
positive_indicators: Score drop; slow pay classification
already_has_channel_exclude_if: Requires licensed data—not web scrape
verification_steps: Subscribe API; match to entity list
